# descope_password_settings (Data Source)

Reads the current password authentication settings for a Descope project.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "descope_password_settings" "current" {}

output "min_password_length" {
  value = data.descope_password_settings.current.min_length
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether password authentication is enabled.
- `expiration` (Boolean) Whether passwords expire after a set number of weeks.
- `expiration_weeks` (Number) Number of weeks before a password expires.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `lock` (Boolean) Whether accounts are locked after a number of failed login attempts.
- `lock_attempts` (Number) Number of failed login attempts before locking the account.
- `lowercase` (Boolean) Whether passwords must contain a lowercase letter.
- `min_length` (Number) Minimum password length.
- `non_alphanumeric` (Boolean) Whether passwords must contain a non-alphanumeric character.
- `number` (Boolean) Whether passwords must contain a number.
- `reuse` (Boolean) Whether password reuse prevention is enabled.
- `reuse_amount` (Number) Number of previous passwords that cannot be reused.
- `uppercase` (Boolean) Whether passwords must contain an uppercase letter.
